preview.text: He said it was a little bit more difficult to follow, and it was kind of simple.
preview.keywords: bit difficult follow little said simple

preview.text: First off, tomorrow from 12 to one, the is a national day of prayer.
preview.keywords: 12 day first national prayer tomorrow

preview.text: And so they're holding an event, a prayer meeting,
preview.keywords: event hold holding meet meeting prayer

preview.text: prayer service at the new Love's Way building.
preview.keywords: build building love new prayer service way

preview.text: I made at the Christian Kirk Memorial at Charlie Daniels.
preview.keywords: charlie christian daniel daniels kirk made memorial

preview.text: letting me do that and come back, so I'm very grateful for that.
preview.keywords: back come grateful lett letting

preview.text: I know it's going to be a great event, praying for our nation, praying for our communities.
preview.keywords: pray praying communiti communities event great nation

preview.text: Also, anyone notice anything new on this stage?
preview.keywords: anyone anyth anything new notice stage

preview.text: He took some, and I'm going to say, he, Mike took some, scrap wood from
preview.keywords: took mike scrap wood

preview.text: know, goes crazy with it, and you'd be like, man, that's insane.
preview.keywords: crazy goe goes insane man

preview.text: And so, man, we got some talented people in our church.
preview.keywords: church man people talent talented

preview.text: Last week, We established the overall
preview.keywords: establish established last overall week

preview.text: timeline of the 70 weeks, which is really 77s of years.
preview.keywords: 70 77s timeline week weeks year years

preview.text: We looked at, in particular, the prophecy given by Gabriel to Daniel in Daniel chapter 9, verse 24 through 27.
preview.keywords: daniel 24 27 9 chapter gabriel given look looked particular prophecy verse

preview.text: Now, I'm not going to read that to you again, but I do want you to make sure that you read that for yourself and stay, you know, kind of in with it, okay?
preview.keywords: read make okay stay sure want yourself

preview.text: But within this verses, the 24th through 27, there are 3 time periods that we are given.
preview.keywords: 24th 27 3 given period periods time vers verses within

preview.text: Turn your Bibles to Romans chapter 12.
preview.keywords: 12 bibl bibles chapter roman romans turn

preview.text: This morning we continue right along in this study.
preview.keywords: along continue morn morning study

preview.text: Me and Joel were actually talking about our new media player.
preview.keywords: actually joel media new player talk talking

preview.text: He's developed, by the way, forgot to say something about that.
preview.keywords: develop developed forgot someth something way

preview.text: We do have a new media player 2.0 that has been built from the ground up.
preview.keywords: 0 2 built ground media new player

preview.text: If you are, if you ever get behind or have to miss a Sunday.
preview.keywords: behind ever mis miss sunday

preview.text: the reason why we're talking about it is because he's getting me to
preview.keywords: gett getting reason talk talking

preview.text: Well, we figured out that we are currently in a three layer study in Romans.
preview.keywords: currently figur figured layer roman romans study three

preview.text: We are studying the book of Romans overall.
preview.keywords: book overall roman romans study studying

preview.text: We started this over 2 years ago.
preview.keywords: 2 ago start started year years

preview.text: Someone asked me, how long are we going to be in Romans moving forward, and I don't know.
preview.keywords: ask asked don forward long mov moving roman romans someone

preview.text: We have 4 more chapters, and that could be a year, 2 years, 10 years.
preview.keywords: year years 10 2 4 chapter chapters

preview.text: But also, we are looking specifically at chapter 12 with the theme, the impact of the gospel.
preview.keywords: 12 chapter gospel impact look looking specifically theme

preview.text: But then within chapter 12, we have another particular theme study of how the gospel impacts our personal ministry in the form of grace gifts.
preview.keywords: 12 another chapter form gift gifts gospel grace impact impacts ministry particular personal study theme within

preview.text: know, mentioned 3 of the 7 gifts in Romans 12.
preview.keywords: 12 3 7 gift gifts mention mentioned roman romans

preview.text: The 1st 3 we talked about were gifts of prophecy,
preview.keywords: 1st 3 gift gifts prophecy talk talked

preview.text: Go ahead and turn your Bibles to Daniel chapter 9.
preview.keywords: 9 ahead bibl bibles chapter daniel turn

preview.text: continuing our study of eschatology, the study of the end times.
preview.keywords: study continu continuing end eschatology tim times

preview.text: Now that we have established the differing timings
preview.keywords: differ differing establish established timing timings

preview.text: and views of when the rapture of the church takes place.
preview.keywords: church place rapture tak takes view views

preview.text: We're going to take a closer look at the seven-year tribulation.
preview.keywords: closer look seven-year take tribulation

preview.text: Now, we establish that these 7 years are the last of the 70 weeks mentioned in Daniel chapter 9, okay?
preview.keywords: 7 70 9 chapter daniel establish last mention mentioned okay week weeks year years

preview.text: We're going to go ahead and read verses 24
preview.keywords: 24 ahead read vers verses

preview.text: going to really get the purpose and duration of the end time tribulation.
preview.keywords: duration end purpose time tribulation

preview.text: So in Daniel chapter 9, verse 24 through 27, it says this.
preview.keywords: 24 27 9 chapter daniel says verse

preview.text: 70 weeks have been decreed for your people and your holy city.
preview.keywords: 70 city decre decreed holy people week weeks

preview.text: an end of sin, to make atonement for iniquity,
preview.keywords: atonement end iniquity make sin

preview.text: to bring in everlasting righteousness, to seal up
preview.keywords: bring everlast everlasting righteousnes righteousness seal

preview.text: vision and prophecy, and to anoint the most holy place.
preview.keywords: anoint holy place prophecy vision

preview.text: That's what the whole purpose of all this end time coming to fruition is.
preview.keywords: com coming end fruition purpose time whole

preview.text: from the issuing of a decree to restore and rebuild Jerusalem, until Messiah the Prince, there will be 7 weeks and 62 weeks.
preview.keywords: week weeks 62 7 decree issu issuing jerusalem messiah prince rebuild restore

preview.text: It will be built again with plasma mode, even in times of distress.
preview.keywords: built distres distress even tim times

preview.text: I want you to turn your Bibles to Romans chapter 12 this morning.
preview.keywords: 12 bibl bibles chapter morn morning roman romans turn want

preview.text: We continue breaking down the grace gifts, the spiritual gifts that Paul lines out in Romans 12.
preview.keywords: gift gifts 12 break breaking continue grace lin lines paul roman romans spiritual

preview.text: I do not believe this is necessarily an exhaustive list, but rather indicate some of the ways the Holy Spirit can manifest the grace of God within us in the church.
preview.keywords: believe church exhaustive god grace holy indicate list manifest necessarily rather spirit way ways within

preview.text: other unknown gifts out there yet to be discovered,
preview.keywords: discover discovered gift gifts unknown yet

preview.text: but what I am saying is exactly what Paul says in Romans 12, verse 4 and 5.
preview.keywords: 12 4 5 exactly paul roman romans saying says verse

preview.text: It says, for as we have many members in one body and all members have not the same office.
preview.keywords: member members body many office says

preview.text: So we, being many, are one body in Christ, and everyone members one of another.
preview.keywords: another body christ everyone many member members

preview.text: going to be going over these gifts in the next couple weeks.
preview.keywords: couple gift gifts next week weeks

preview.text: to the unity of the church, you are not operating by the Holy Spirit or the grace of God.
preview.keywords: church god grace holy operat operating spirit unity

preview.text: I need us to realize this giftedness does not make you better,
preview.keywords: better giftednes giftedness make need realize

preview.text: The grace gift that I'm using right here in this moment, I did not earn.
preview.keywords: earn gift grace moment using

preview.text: The same grace gift that you have that you're serving with the church today.
preview.keywords: church gift grace serv serving today

preview.text: The same grace that we have was given by the same Savior that we have, and that's Jesus Christ.
preview.keywords: christ given grace jesu jesus savior

preview.text: I do believe that some people can say, well, I don't have any of these, so I guess I'm off the hook.
preview.keywords: believe don gues guess hook people

preview.text: Grace, the grace of God that you have received has
preview.keywords: grace god receiv received

preview.text: Remember, there are 4 primary texts involving grace gifts.
preview.keywords: 4 gift gifts grace involv involving primary remember text texts
